pk/sk + gsi1 + gsi2

penguin-health-stedi
TTL expires_at, PITR
gsi1 patient_hash
RETAIN

span.p:
penguin-health-audit
KMS CMK, PITR
TTL 90d, gsi1 patient
RETAIN

deny destructive

penguin-health-audit
DirectPut to Parquet via Glue
60s/64MB buffer
dynamic partitioning year/month/day

KMS CMK
alias penguin-health-audit
rotation enabled

alias penguin-health-fhir-*
